title: QuantumScape Stock: Solid-State Battery Pioneer at a Crossroads
text: QuantumScape ended Q1 2026 with $904.7 million in liquidity, providing the company with a solid runway through 2029 without needing to rush into dilutive fundraising. The company ended 2025 with $970.8 million in liquidity, giving it substantial resources for continued development activities. Based on fiscal year 2025 data, QuantumScape had $230.5 million in cash against an annual operating cash burn of $242.5 million, giving an estimated cash runway of approximately 11 months at the current burn rate. Management reiterated full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA loss guidance of $250 million to $275 million, and the company's capital guidance remains between $40 million and $60 million for full year 2026. With a market capitalization of $4.42 billion and a current ratio of 15.95, the company maintains exceptional liquidity to fund operations. The company recorded $19.5 million in actual customer billings in 2025, mostly tied to PowerCo milestones, representing the first real cash from commercial activity.
